# CONNECT(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  connect — connect to a network node

## SYNOPSIS
  connect <node>

## DESCRIPTION
Establishes a connection to a node on the NexusCorp network.
Use `scan` first to discover available nodes.

## EXAMPLES
  connect node-1
  connect chimera-control
  connect nexus-gateway

## NODES
  node-1          NexusCorp edge node, maintenance access
  chimera-control CHIMERA AI control interface (use nc chimera-control 8443)
  nexus-gateway   Internet gateway node

## SEE ALSO
  scan, hack, nc, ssh, nmap
